summary: Iteration 30 - Comprehensive Bug Fix Verification COMPLETE. All 16 backend tests PASSED. All frontend tabs verified working. CRITICAL FIXES CONFIRMED: 1) Technical Analysis uses Upstox live data (source='upstox', 75 candles for NIFTY50 5min), 2) BANKNIFTY 30minute also uses Upstox (13 candles), 3) Risk ratio guard working (signals show Target > StopLoss), 4) Auto-settings update works, 5) All indicators (RSI/MACD/VWAP/EMA/SMA) present, 6) Tax Reports, Journal, AI Brain, Signals tabs all functional.

minor.issue: Initially shows target_pct=15, stoploss_pct=30 (inverted ratio in DB), but the signal generator has guard to enforce target >= stoploss during signal creation

issues: Minor: React hydration warning (span inside option) - cosmetic only, functionality works
WebSocket connection to wss://...api/ws/market-data fails with 403 - uses REST fallback (not critical, data still loads)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX 1: technical.js uses correct Upstox interval mapping (1minute, 30minute, day instead of 5minute, 1day)
VERIFIED FIX 2: signal_generator.js line 88-93 has risk ratio guard - if target_pct < stop_loss_pct, enforces 1:1 minimum
VERIFIED FIX 3: trading.js line 18 uses db._sharedAIEngine for shared AI Engine instance
VERIFIED FIX 4: news.js line 17 creates shared AI Engine and stores on db._sharedAIEngine
VERIFIED FIX 5: signal_generator.js line 62 uses count check (openInInstrument.length >= maxTotalTrades) for max_open_trades
VERIFIED FIX 6: signal_generator.js line 294-295 uses signal's pre-calculated stop_loss and target values for live trade execution
VERIFIED: Signals show correct risk ratio (Entry: ₹150, Target: ₹195, Stop Loss: ₹105 - Target > StopLoss)
VERIFIED: Technical Analysis shows 'Live Data' button and real NIFTY50 price (23,134.65)
VERIFIED: All 5 indicators visible: RSI, MACD, VWAP, EMA, SMA
test_credentials: None required - Uses Upstox token from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v4.3.0 bug fixes verified working. Technical Analysis uses Upstox live data (confirmed source='upstox'). Risk ratio guard working - signals correctly show target > stoploss. 77 orders today with -₹951 P&L (real loss from user's trades). Auto-entry is OFF (user setting), Auto-exit is ON. Market closed during testing (weekend). Tax Reports feature shows correct data from Upstox (7 trades, ₹3,076 gross P&L).

risk_ratio_guard.evidence: Signals show Entry: ₹150, Target: ₹195, Stop Loss: ₹105 (Target > StopLoss)

shared_ai_engine.evidence: db._sharedAIEngine created in news.js and reused in trading.js

live_trade_uses_signal_values.evidence: Line 294-295 uses signal.stop_loss and signal.target instead of recalculating
